name: Party Quiche Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pie crust mix according to package directions and roll out on a floured surface to form a rectangle measuring 16 x 11 inches.
2. Arrange the dough in an ungreased 15 1/2 x 10 1/2 x 1 inch baking pan.
3. Combine the broccoli, cheese, and flour evenly over the pastry crust.
4. Mix together the chicken broth, heavy cream, eggs, and Dijon mustard.
5. Pour the liquid mixture evenly over the broccoli mixture.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 40 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the quiche squares to cool slightly before cutting into them.
8. Garnish as desired. Makes 50 appetizers.
